case_title: GLOBAL ACCEPTANCE CREDIT COMPANY, LP AKA GA CREDIT VS. MING LIANG et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLOBAL ACCEPTANCE CREDIT COMPANY, LP AKA GA CREDIT LC FKA GLOBAL ACCEPTANCE CREDIT CORPORATION, AS ASSIGNEE OF FIRST NATIONAL BANK OMAHA SERVED AUG-27-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, MING

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLOBAL ACCEPTANCE CREDIT COMPANY, LP AKA GA CREDIT LC FKA GLOBAL ACCEPTANCE CREDIT CORPORATION, AS ASSIGNEE OF FIRST NATIONAL BANK OMAHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIANG, MING $9,549.56 PRINCIPAL, $260.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,809.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF GLOBAL ACCEPTANCE CREDIT COMPANY, LP AKA GA CREDIT LC FKA GLOBAL ACCEPTANCE CREDIT CORPORATION, AS ASSIGNEE OF FIRST NATIONAL BANK OMAHA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLOBAL ACCEPTANCE CREDIT COMPANY, LP AKA GA CREDIT LC FKA GLOBAL ACCEPTANCE CREDIT CORPORATION, AS ASSIGNEE OF FIRST NATIONAL BANK OMAHA AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, MING DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-01-2011
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
